title: Glass style GUI
body:
A glass style gui pack.   
There are some translucent parts in the texture, Minecraft now support translucent gui texture from 1.21.2, but they will be opaque in older versions. Unless use some specific mods.   
Such as [Translucency Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), [NEU](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughupdates). (or any other mods that I don't know.)   
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aabe64e59398da03b9fefae4c8c2e9e6110ff491_0.webp)
_____________________________________________________________
### Mod Support (1.20.2+)  
- [appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)   
- [chatpatches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches)   
- [commandkeys](https://modrinth.com/mod/commandkeys)   
- [firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)   
- [inventoryhud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)   
- [inventory profiles next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)   
- [litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)   
- [modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)   
- [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)   
- [skyblockaddons](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblockaddons-unofficial)   
- [skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap)   
- [soundcontroller](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-controller)   
- [transparent entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/transparent-entities)   
![mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5e4e52fafa627c13e47162e9f8c259328a87414.png)   
   
And something for NotEnoughUpdates mod in 1.8.9:  
Equipment hud and sword-style custom wither cloak.
![texture for neu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a3fabba1eab513aa3c7a5782028d01ac295345b.png)
